assertions.title: Sign up with email and password

steps.expected: Signup form with email, password fields and submit button displayed
steps.observed: Signup form displayed with email textbox, password textbox, and Sign Up button

steps.expected: Account created and redirected to /dashboard or confirmation prompt
steps.observed: Successfully redirected to /dashboard with authenticated session

steps.expected: Dashboard loads with Sign Out button visible, indicating authenticated session
steps.observed: Dashboard displayed with navigation links (Dashboard, New Plan, Playbooks) and Sign Out button

evidence.network: POST /auth/signup via Supabase auth -> success, redirected to /dashboard

steps.expected: User signed out and redirected to landing page
steps.observed: Successfully signed out, redirected to http://localhost:3000/
Signup form displayed with email, password fields and Sign Up button

steps.action: Fill same email used in VAL-AUTH-002
steps.expected: Email field populated with existing email

steps.observed: Sign Up button clicked, form submitted

steps.action: Verify error message displayed for duplicate email
steps.expected: User-friendly error message shown, no duplicate account created, user remains on signup page
steps.observed: Error message displayed: 'A user with this email already exists. Please sign in instead.' User remained on /auth/signup page

evidence.network: POST /auth/signup via Supabase auth -> returned error for duplicate email

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed, 0 failed. VAL-AUTH-002: Successful signup with unique email redirected to dashboard. VAL-AUTH-008: Duplicate email signup correctly displayed error message 'A user with this email already exists. Please sign in instead.' and prevented account creation.
